lines.name: Bakerloo
lines.reason: Bakerloo Line: Severe delays due to an earlier fire alert at Piccadilly Circus. London Underground tickets are being accepted on London Buses, Lioness line and Thameslink services.

lines.name: Central
lines.reason: Central Line: Minor delays due to train cancellations.

lines.name: Lioness
lines.reason: Lioness Line: Minor delays due to an earlier signalling problem.

lines.name: Piccadilly
lines.reason: Piccadilly Line: Minor delays due to strike action.

lines.name: Tram
lines.reason: LONDON TRAMS: Wednesday 11 until Wednesday 25 February, no service between East Croydon and Beckenham Junction / Elmers End / New Addington. Replacement buses operate, but will not serve Lebanon Road.
